# SafetyOf (safetyof.ai)

> Measure your AI safety posture in 5 minutes.

Run a free AI Safety Posture Score, see exactly where you fall short of the EU AI Act and ISO 42001, then close the gaps with guided remediation.

## What this is
SafetyOf is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp.assess: Run a full EU AI Act risk-and-control assessment from any MCP client or agent workflow.
- ai-safety-posture-mcp.score: Return a live AI safety posture score for a given system, model or deployment.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://safetyof.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://safetyof.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://safetyof.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://safetyof.ai/pricing/
